title: Fig. 2 Fig. 3
subject: Mathematics
objective: To establish the fact that triangle is the most rigid figure
materials:
Cycle spokes/wooden sticks/tooth picks etc.,
valve tube pieces, nut bolts, thick thread, cutter.
procedure:
1.   Take a sufficient number of wooden sticks about 10 cm in length.
2.   Cut valve tube into several pieces each of length, say, 3 cm.
3.   Join the sticks with the help of valve tube pieces to make different
shapes   such   as   a   triangle,   quadrilateral,   pentagon   and   hexagon   [Fig.1].
Fig. 1
observation:
1.   Press any vertex or any side of the hexagon made of sticks.
Does it change its shape? Yes (Fig. 2).
discussion:
This activity may be used to explain the concept of area of various
geometrical   shapes.
104 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
